name: Paper Collector
description: Auto-detect research/paper URLs in messages, extract metadata, and save to a Notion database.

databaseId.description: Notion database ID to save papers to.

parentPageId.description: Notion page ID under which to create the database (used by notion_setup).

mode.description: Execution mode. 'api' calls AI APIs directly for summary generation. 'agent' relies on the hosting LLM agent.

model.description: AI model for generating summaries in API mode. Supported: claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, gpt-5.4, gpt-4.1, gpt-4.1-mini, o3, o4-mini, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.0-flash, deepseek-chat, deepseek-reasoner.

includeImages.description: Whether to include figures in blog pages. When false, image quality gates are skipped.

databaseId.label: Notion Database ID
databaseId.help: The ID of the Notion database where papers are saved.

parentPageId.label: Parent Page ID
parentPageId.help: The Notion page under which the database is created during setup.

mode.label: Execution Mode
mode.help: 'api' = plugin calls AI APIs directly (needs API key). 'agent' = hosting LLM generates content.

model.label: AI Model
model.help: Which model to use for summary generation in API mode.

includeImages.label: Include Figures
includeImages.help: Whether blog pages include paper figures. Disable for faster processing.
